phases.name: Refactor AgentLoop - Outer Loop & Follow-up Support

tasks.content: Analyze reference agent-loop outer loop structure and plan integration
Add outer loop to executeLoop to handle follow-up messages after agent stop condition
Integrate getFollowUpMessages config hook into outer loop decision
Ensure proper event emissions for follow-up processing (turn_start/turn_end)
Fix test failure: adjust final result handling to match expected behavior
Run full test suite to ensure no regressions
Update EVOLUTION.md, AGENT_METRICS.md, AGENT_PROFILE.md with changes
